pageContext.name: Deathstroke
pageContext.description: I've seen the look more times than I can remember. The look of murder.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Deathstroke Fine Art Print, an original DC Comics art print by artist InHyuk Lee.  Considered to be the deadliest assassin in the DC Universe, Slade Wilson is Deathstroke the Terminator. This action-packed image shows the master mercenary mid-battle as he draws his swords for another mission. The sky glows red with rage as Deathstroke leaps over rooftops and shatters windows in tireless pursuit of his target, determined to collect on the contract.  Each Deathstroke Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed format, this exciting DC Comics wall art is prepared to take on your Justice League collection.  Set your sights on Slade and bring home the Deathstroke Fine Art Print by InHyuk Lee today!
